perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a white t-shirt and blue-and-white striped pants stands in a hallway in front of a black door with a restroom sign. He holds a credit card and looks at the camera with an exaggeratedly surprised and wide-eyed facial expression. (2) He approaches an electronic payment terminal mounted on the wall, showing the card to the lens before tapping it against the reader. The screen on the reader updates as he points to it. (3) After the door clicks open, he enters a bright, modern bathroom with white brick-style wall tiles and black floor tiles. He enthusiastically explores the space, touching a large black trash bin and lifting the toilet lid while maintaining a cheerful and impressed demeanor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, his tone is high-pitched and humorous. There is low-level ambient noise from a public indoor environment. (2) Sharp electronic beeps occur as the credit card interacts with the payment terminal. (3) A distinct mechanical clicking sound is heard as the door lock releases. (4) The male voice continues speaking with a slight echo consistent with a tiled room, expressing wonder and making playful comments about the bathroom's quality.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '上挪威百貨公司的廁所請刷卡30元' (To use the toilet in a Norwegian department store, please swipe your card for 30 NTD) - Hook text, informative and surprised tone. (2) '10.00' - Functional text on the payment terminal screen indicating the price in local currency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Demo of payment -> Tour of interior

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male with brown hair, wearing a loose white t-shirt, a black crossbody bag with a small flag sticker, and vertical blue and white striped trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is a hallway with geometric patterned wallpaper and a black door. The second scene is a clean, modern public restroom with white subway tiles and black accents.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel vlog snippet intended to share a cultural shock experience regarding the high cost and payment method of public restrooms in Norway. The creator uses his own experience of paying 10 NOK (approx. 30 NTD) to show the audience the process and the 'premium' interior of the facility, aiming to entertain and inform followers about local travel details.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with exaggerated facial expressions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a specific micro-moment of travel that resonates with audiences interested in international cost-of-living comparisons.
